raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "DACA was implemented by President Barack Obama in 2012.",
    "There are approximately 800,000 DACA recipients in the United States.",
    "Of the DACA recipients, 220,000 live in California.",
    "DACA was designed to ensure that children who are as American as anyone else could continue to be productive members of the economy and society.",
    "There is a legislative solution currently in Congress that would allow young immigrants to pursue citizenship.",
    "The DREAM Act would provide a pathway to documentation for young immigrants.",
    "According to an April survey, 78% of American voters support the opportunity for Dreamers to remain permanently in the United States.",
    "73% of Trump voters support the opportunity for Dreamers to remain permanently in the United States."
  ]
}
```
